auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Benchmark Email API token used in XMLAPI query parameters (token/method/output=json). Create or view it from your Benchmark Email developer settings and API guide: https://www.benchmarkemail.com/features/api/.

extraFields.label: API Base URL
extraFields.description: The Benchmark Email API base URL for your account region. Use the host documented in the Benchmark API guide or your account's developer settings: https://www.benchmarkemail.com/download/Benchmark-API-Getting-Started-Guide.pdf.

actions.name: get_account_summary
actions.description: Get the current Benchmark Email account summary and image storage plan details.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

FreePlan.description: Whether the account is on the free plan: 1 for free, 0 for paid.

Limit.description: The total image storage limit available for the account.

outputSchema.description: The Benchmark Email account summary response.

actions.name: get_contact_details
actions.description: Get detailed information for a specific Benchmark Email contact email within a specific list.

list_id.description: The contact list identifier that contains the contact.

email.description: The email address of the contact to look up within the list.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading a single contact from a Benchmark Email list.

Status.description: The status code returned by Benchmark Email for this response wrapper.

ID.description: The unique contact identifier in the list.

Status.description: The contact status code returned by Benchmark Email.

EmailType.description: The email type classification returned by Benchmark Email.

ContactMasterID.description: The Benchmark Email master contact identifier.

EmailPerm.description: The email permission flag returned by Benchmark Email.

Data.description: The detailed contact payload returned by Benchmark Email, including standard and custom field values.

outputSchema.description: The detailed contact wrapper returned by Benchmark Email.

actions.name: get_contact_list_summary
actions.description: Get summary counts for a Benchmark Email contact list, including active, bounced, pending, and unsubscribed contacts.

list_id.description: The contact list identifier to summarize.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading Benchmark Email contact list summary metrics.

Status.description: The status code returned by Benchmark Email for this response wrapper.

TotalContacts.description: The total number of contacts in the list.

ActiveContacts.description: The number of active contacts in the list.

BouncedContacts.description: The number of bounced contacts in the list.

PendingContacts.description: The number of pending contacts in the list.

UnsubscribedContacts.description: The number of unsubscribed contacts in the list.

Data.description: The contact list summary metrics returned by Benchmark Email.

outputSchema.description: The contact list summary wrapper returned by Benchmark Email.

actions.name: get_contacts_in_list
actions.description: Get paginated contacts from a Benchmark Email list with optional search, filter, and sorting parameters.

list_id.description: The contact list identifier to query.

language.description: The Benchmark Email language code forwarded to listGetFilteredContacts when needed.

filter.description: The predefined contact subset filter returned by Benchmark Email.

order_by.description: The contact field used for sorting list results.

sort_order.description: The sort direction used for contact list results.

page_size.description: The number of contacts to return per page.

page_number.description: The page number to return, starting at 1.

search_type.description: The search match mode used when filtering contacts in a list.

search_field.description: The field name to search, such as email or firstname.

search_filter.description: The text filter to apply when searching within contacts.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading paginated contacts from a Benchmark Email list.

Status.description: The status code returned by Benchmark Email for this response wrapper.

Count.description: The total number of contacts matching the current list query.

ID.description: The unique contact entry identifier in the list.

ReSend.description: The Benchmark Email resend indicator or action token.

EmailType.description: The email type classification returned by Benchmark Email.

CreatedDate.description: The date when the contact was created.

UpdatedDate.description: The date when the contact was last updated.

ContactMasterID.description: The Benchmark Email master contact identifier.

items.description: A single contact record returned from a Benchmark Email contact list query.

Data.description: The contacts returned for the current page.

outputSchema.description: The paginated contacts wrapper returned by Benchmark Email.
